# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for microservices architecture
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    DependsOn: IGW
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicRT:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicSubnetRTAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    DependsOn: PublicRT
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !GetAtt PublicRT.RouteTableId

  NATGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NatGateway'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt PublicSubnet1.NatGatewayAllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.3.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs]

  PrivateRT:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PrivateSubnetRTAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    DependsOn: PrivateRT
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !GetAtt PrivateRT.RouteTableId

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.4.0/24'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs]

  PrivateSubnetRTAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    DependsOn: PrivateRT
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !GetAtt PrivateRT.RouteTableId

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !GetAtt PublicRT.RouteTableId
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PrivateNATGWRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: NATGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !GetAtt PrivateRT.RouteTableId
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

  PrivateNATGWRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: NATGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !GetAtt PrivateRT.RouteTableId
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway

Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Description: The ID of the VPC created by this template.
